What We Do

Our Services

Every service is done on-site, on your schedule, anywhere in the GTA.

🔑

Car Key Replacement

Lost, damaged, or stolen key? We cut and program a new key on-site for most makes and models. No tow required.

Most vehicles — same day
📡

Smart Key Programming

Push-to-start fobs, proximity keys, and remote starters programmed to your vehicle on the spot.

All major makes supported
💳

Transponder Chip Keys

We clone or program transponder chips for a fraction of the dealer price — cut and coded on-site.

Save vs. dealership
🏠

Condo & Building Fobs

Duplicate your condo access fob, garage remote, or elevator key card fast and affordably.

Ask about your building
➕

Spare Key Add-On

Don't wait until you're locked out — get a spare cut and programmed today while we're already there.

Best time to get a spare
🚗

All Makes & Models

Honda, Toyota, BMW, Ford, GM, Kia, Hyundai and more. If it has a key, we likely support it.

Don't see your car? Ask us

How It Works

Simple. Fast. Done.

Three steps and your key problem is solved — no tow truck, no waiting room.

01
📞

Call or Text

Tell us your year, make, model, and the issue. We'll give you a quote right away — no runaround.

02
🚗

We Come To You

We roll out to your location — home, work, parking lot, wherever. No tow needed.

03
✅

Key Made On-Site

Your key is cut and programmed right there. You drive away. That's it.

04
💰

Pay & Save

You pay a flat rate — no hidden fees, no dealer markup. Transparent pricing every time.

FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know before calling.

Prices vary by make and model, but most replacements range from $150–$350 — compared to $400–$700 at the dealership. We give you a quote before we start. No surprises.
No. We come to you — home, office, parking lot, or wherever the car is sitting. All our equipment is mobile. No tow truck needed in most cases.
We support most major makes — Honda, Toyota, Ford, GM, Chevrolet, BMW, Audi, Volkswagen, Hyundai, Kia, Mazda, Nissan, Lexus, Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep, Ram, and more. If you don't see your vehicle listed, just call — we likely still support it.
Yes! We duplicate most condo fobs, parking garage remotes, and access cards. Some newer buildings use encrypted fobs that can't be copied — text us a photo and we'll let you know right away.
Most jobs are same-day. We serve Vaughan, Woodbridge, Mississauga, Brampton, North York, Richmond Hill, and surrounding GTA areas. Call or text to get a time estimate.
Yes. We operate 7 days a week. Weekend and evening service available — call or text 289-946-3846 to confirm availability.
